_comment: Curated, hand-editable impact metrics. Markup reads them via metrics-loader.js (data-metric-id). 'to' is the count-up target; prefix/suffix wrap it. 'value' is the static fallback shown before JS / under reduced-motion. No backend.

metrics.label: Faster Pipelines
metrics.aria: Up to 10 times faster data pipelines
metrics._note: Spark/Glue/Databricks optimizations — representative jobs cut from 1-6 hours to minutes (confirmed 2026-06-03).

metrics.label: Records / Day
metrics.aria: More than 20 million records processed per day

metrics.label: Avg. Savings / Project
metrics.aria: More than 6 thousand dollars average cost savings per project
metrics._note: Average AWS/cloud cost reduction per optimization project.
